summary: Frontend testing COMPLETE for Unified Zone Form Fields. All features verified: Edit Zone dialog has all shared fields + zone status section, New Zone dialog has all shared fields + shape confirmation header (no zone status). Both dialogs share the ZoneFormFields component with identical zone-form-* data-testid prefixes. Area calculator, capacity levels, and carpet calculator all working correctly.

new_zone_dialog.carpet_calc_visible: PASS - Shows carpet calculation: 1,722 total carpets, 41 rows, 42 per row

shared_zone_form_fields.area_calculator_identical: PASS - zone-form-area-calc, zone-form-length, zone-form-width, zone-form-area-result in both
shared_zone_form_fields.carpet_calc_identical: PASS - zone-form-carpet-calc, zone-form-carpet-length, zone-form-carpet-width in both

critical_code_review_comments: ZoneFormFields component at lines 20-178 provides shared form structure
All shared fields have data-testid prefix 'zone-form-*' as specified
ZoneEditDialog uses ZoneFormFields at line 285-286 plus Zone Status section at lines 289-298
NewZoneDialog uses ZoneFormFields at line 336 plus shape confirmation header at lines 327-333
Conditional sections (capacity levels, carpet calc) correctly show only when area > 0
Area calculator auto-calculates when length or width changes (lines 21-35)
Code is well-structured with shared component pattern

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All unified zone form features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 tested unified zone form fields. Both Edit Zone and New Zone dialogs now share ZoneFormFields component. Shared fields: zone-form-name, zone-form-code, zone-form-category, zone-form-area-calc, zone-form-length, zone-form-width, zone-form-area-result, zone-form-carpet-calc, zone-form-carpet-length, zone-form-carpet-width, zone-form-note. Edit-only: zone-status-active, zone-status-inactive, zone-status-delete. New Zone has shape confirmation header with point count. To test Edit dialog: edit mode → click zone → floating toolbar → تعديل. To test New Zone: shapes dropdown → rectangle → drag on map. Tested on Feb 19 session.
